overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia exploring a lavish medieval brothel interior. The environment features rich red decor, candlelight, wooden paneling, and classical statues. Geralt moves through multiple rooms including a private chamber, library, and main lounge before ascending to an upper floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: private room with red patterned wallpaper

events.description: Geralt approaches and opens the wooden door to exit the room

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks across the room toward a wooden door to exit the private chamber

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress standing near the fireplace

entered.detail: dark red wallpaper with intricate floral patterns covering the walls
lit wall-mounted lamp providing warm ambient light
dark wooden door frame leading to the next room
tall dark wood cabinet with glass doors

segments.scene_description: Geralt begins in a small private room with distinctive red patterned wallpaper and warm lighting from a wall sconce. He walks toward a wooden door at the far end of the room, passing a wooden cabinet, while a woman in green stands near the fireplace in the background.

events.description: exits the red wallpaper room into a wood-paneled library area
turns toward the next doorway leading to the main hall

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks through the doorway into a wood-paneled room with bookshelves and turns toward the next exit

notable_agents.action: man sitting in a chair examining papers near the bookshelf
person sitting near the stained glass window

entered.detail: dark oak paneling covering the walls
tall bookshelves filled with leather-bound books
wooden desk with scattered papers and a candle
decorative window with colored diamond-patterned glass

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a quiet library area with dark wooden paneling and tall bookshelves. He passes a man reading at a desk and approaches another doorway, with stained glass windows visible on the right wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: main lounge with red curtains and classical statues

events.description: enters the main brothel hall with red velvet curtains and marble statues
pauses briefly to observe the room before continuing

agents.ego_description: Geralt enters the grand hall and walks past various patrons and courtesans, observing the lavish decorations

notable_agents.action: courtesan in lingerie walking past Geralt toward the seating area
group of people socializing near the red curtains

entered.detail: heavy red curtains dividing the lounge areas
classical nude statues mounted on wall niches
ornate iron chandelier with multiple candles
large white animal fur rug on the floor
low table with platters of grapes and pastries
grand wooden staircase with carved railings leading upward

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters the main lounge, a lavish space with red velvet curtains, classical marble statues on the walls, and candlelight from an ornate chandelier. He walks past a refreshment table laden with food and spots the grand staircase to the left while courtesans and patrons move about the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: central lounge area with seating and musicians

events.description: Geralt sits down briefly on a bench then stands up to continue exploring
turns and walks toward the staircase area

agents.ego_description: Geralt pauses to sit and observe the room's occupants, then continues walking through the lounge toward the stairs

notable_agents.action: woman lounging on a wooden bench eating grapes
musicians playing string instruments on a raised platform

entered.detail: red heraldic banner with white eagle emblem
wooden bench with red cushions
decorative carved wooden room divider

segments.scene_description: Geralt explores the central lounge, passing a red heraldic banner and a woman lounging on a bench. He briefly sits down before continuing toward the wooden staircase, while musicians play in the background. The marble statues and red curtains remain visible as he moves through the space.

events.description: begins ascending the wooden staircase to the upper level
enters darker upper corridor with reduced lighting

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbs the wooden staircase to the upper level of the brothel

entered.detail: carved wooden handrail along the staircase
dark wooden corridor at the top of the stairs
lit lantern hanging from the ceiling of the upper floor

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches and climbs the grand wooden staircase, holding the carved railing as he ascends. The lighting becomes dimmer as he reaches the upper floor landing, where a hanging lantern provides the only illumination in the dark corridor ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a lavish medieval brothel, transitioning from intimate private quarters into a grand public lounge before ascending to a dim upper floor. It begins in a small room with red patterned wallpaper and warm sconce lighting, moving past a wooden cabinet and a woman by the fireplace toward a doorway. As Geralt steps through, the scene shifts into a quiet library characterized by dark wooden paneling and stained glass windows before opening up into a sprawling main lounge filled with red velvet curtains, marble statues, and the glow of an ornate chandelier. The camera then glides through this opulent space, passing refreshment tables and lounging patrons, before turning toward a grand wooden staircase. Finally, the movement follows the ascent up the carved railing as the bright lounge fades behind, leading into a dark upper corridor illuminated only by a single hanging lantern.
